title: sporobolus utilis
intro: Sporobolus utilis, also known as Chinese dwarf grass or dwarf grass, is a type of perennial grass native to China, used for its medicinal properties. Its roots and rhizomes have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In traditional Chinese medicine, Sporobolus utilis is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and is also used in herbal supplements and tonics.
